ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Hilton Metal Forging Limited held an Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) on July 15, 2026, to approve a special business item: the creation and issuance of new equity shares through a Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP). This signals a material capital-raising initiative for the company, which will result in potential dilution for existing shareholders upon the issuance of the new shares. The voting results for this significant financial action are pending and expected to be disclosed within two working days, with no immediate procedural red flags noted in this filing.
